text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa races toward the NHK Mile Cup.
However, she also has a problem on her hands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has no rivals running in the same races as her
and longs for someone to hone her abilities with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She invites King Halo to join her in the NHK Mile
Cup out of desperation, but her reckless request
is turned down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Witnessing the exchange, I rack my brain for a
way to make her wish for a rival come true.
